_notice: Curated synthetic-over-real Pinellas County asset layer. Public-record schools, hospitals, fire/police HQs use real names and approximate real coordinates. Red Cross sites, mobile home parks, and aggregate counts (shelter capacity, enrollment, dialysis patients, MHP unit counts) are synthetic but plausible. Phase 2 swaps synthetic fields for live ArcGIS/HIFLD/FL DOE feeds — the schema below matches those sources for a drop-in swap.

_schema.type: red_cross | school | fire_station | police_station | mobile_home_park | hospital
_schema.name: string (human-readable)
_schema.attrs: object (type-specific: enrollment, beds, units, capacity, etc.)
